title: Export shows success before data is ready
description: The UI reports a queued export as downloadable.
requirement: REQ-UX-3: The dashboard must label queued exports as processing until a downloadable file exists.
seededViolation: A success toast appears immediately after queueing the job.
whyItMatters: Users waste time looking for a file that does not exist.

expectedFindings.title: Queued export is presented as ready
expectedFindings.description: The toast promises a download before the queued job produces it.

distractors.reasonNotAnIssue: Asynchronous processing is allowed when the UI describes it correctly.
